info.name: Turbo BabyMart API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Turbo BabyMart E-commerce Platform

## Setup Instructions:

1. **Import Collection**: Import this JSON file into Postman
2. **Set Environment Variables**:
   - `base_url`: Your API base URL (e.g., http://localhost:8000)
   - `token`: JWT token (will be auto-set after login)
   - `user_id`: Current user ID (will be auto-set after login)

3. **Authentication Flow**:
   - Start with 'Auth > Login' to get your token
   - Token will be automatically saved and used in subsequent requests

4. **Test Order**:
   - Auth → Users → Products → Categories → Brands → Cart → Orders → Purchases → Suppliers

## Notes:
- All protected endpoints require valid JWT token in Authorization header
- Admin-only endpoints require user to have admin role
- Use the Tests tab in each request to see auto-populated variables

exec: console.log('Token and User ID saved to environment');
